name: Vegetarian Stir Fried Crab Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the mushrooms for 15 minutes, then drain and slice into thin strips.
2. Chop the tips off the snow peas and slice thinly.
3. Heat the peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
4. Stir fry the mashed carrot and potato until crispy, about 4 minutes.
5. Add the bamboo shoots and sliced mushrooms to the pan. Continue stir frying for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Mix in the sugar and salt.
7. Add the rice vinegar and serve.
